web.title: IEEE Frank Rosenblatt Award - Wikipedia
web.description: The IEEE Frank Rosenblatt Award is a Technical Field Award of the IEEE.
snippets: The 2010 IEEE Frank Rosenblatt Award was presented to Michio Sugeno for contributions to the theory of fuzzy sets.
The award was established in 2004 and is named in honor of Frank Rosenblatt.

news.title: Andrew Barto and Richard Sutton Receive 2026 IEEE Frank Rosenblatt Award
news.description: CICS professors named recipients of the 2026 award for reinforcement learning.

metadata.query: Who received the IEEE Frank Rosenblatt Award in 2010?
